productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Driver Venetian Brown Shoe
description: These slip-ons from timberland are understated and comfortable and look perfect for lounging around in. The casual design gets a sophisticated edge with the use of premium materials and sleek styling. Team this with chinos and shirts for a cool resortwear look.Upper Slip-on style for easy removal and insertion of the feet Genuine leather uppers with stitch detailing for comfort and durability Leather lining for greater comfort Embossed brand logo on the side of heel for added style Midsole Cushioned leather footbed for all day comfort Outsole Outsole attached in segements to the upper to increase flexibilty and give a no-shoe feel Outsole with square markings for greater traction Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
